description: MANDATORY anti-overlap (pulled-forward roadmap #204): discriminates the a11y-specialized pass (keyboard/labels/focus/contrast/screen reader) from the general UI walkthrough (clickthrough-test-engineer) and general manual case authoring (manual-test-case-creator), within the UI/manual cluster.

cases.prompt: Verify our app works keyboard-only and with a screen reader, check contrast, and wire automated a11y scans into CI.
cases.reason: Keyboard/focus/contrast/screen-reader verification with automated + manual halves is exactly the a11y harness — not a general walkthrough or generic case authoring.

cases.prompt: Do a full pass over the app clicking every screen and form to find what's broken.
cases.reason: General breakage hunting across the UI is a clickthrough session; no a11y-specific lens was requested.

cases.prompt: Write manual test cases for the subscription upgrade flow with steps and expected results.
cases.reason: Generic functional manual cases belong to the case creator; the harness owns only the a11y checklists.

cases.prompt: Automate the checkout journey in the browser as a regression test.
cases.reason: Journey automation is E2E engineering; the harness only injects a11y assertions into that layer by design handoff.
